reason: Verified that the agent can use the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username with proper account access grants.
steps: Step 1 - Navigate to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Super Agent home page with agent list visible in sidebar
Step 2 - Found and clicked the "QA-20260417-014522-3tyz" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page opened successfully, showing the agent with "idle" status
Step 3 - Verified agent status - Agent status confirmed as "idle" (blue indicator visible in top right)
Step 4 - Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message successfully submitted, agent transitioned to "working" status
Step 5 - Granted GitHub account access - "Account Access Request" card appeared asking for GitHub access; clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant access to the agent
Step 6 - Handled API request review - "API Request Review" card appeared asking to allow GET /user request; clicked "Allow Once" to permit the GitHub API call

Step 7 - Verified response with GitHub username - Agent successfully returned response: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." The response clearly includes the GitHub username as required. Agent completed in 25 seconds.
